problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
